fuses.description: (CVT Oil Pump) Powers the oil pump for CVT lubrication and cooling.
(Starter Cut) Controls starter motor cut-off to prevent operation in certain conditions.
(Radiator Fan (Rad Fan)) Powers the radiator fan for engine cooling.
(USM) Controls electronic modules under the seat or other system modules.
(CVT Control (Battery)) Powers the CVT control unit.
(Engine Control (Eng Cont)) Powers the engine control unit or related circuits.
(Fuel Pump (INJ)) Powers the fuel pump for fuel injection.
(Radiator Fan (Rad Fan)) Additional fuse for radiator fan.
(Radiator Fan (Rad Fan)) Additional fuse for radiator fan, possibly low-speed operation.
(Vehicle Dynamic Control (VDC Cont)) Powers the vehicle dynamic control system for stability and traction.
(Injector 2 Relay) Controls power to fuel injector 2.

individualFusePages.title: Fuel pump relay
individualFusePages.problemsTitle: View problems with the fuel pump relay

fuses.description: (Injector 1 Relay) Controls power to fuel injector 1.
(Horn Relay) Controls power to the horn circuit.
(Starter Cut Relay (ST Cut Relay)) Controls cutting off the starter motor.
